name: Fastmail MCP
description: Official Fastmail MCP server. AI agents read, search, and write email, contacts, and calendar via OAuth — no scraping, no fragile third-party integration.

skills.name: Email Read & Search
skills.description: Read and search Fastmail inbox, sent mail, and folders with full message content via MCP tools

skills.name: Email Compose
skills.description: Compose and send emails on behalf of the authenticated Fastmail user via MCP tool calls

skills.name: Calendar Access
skills.description: Read and create calendar events in Fastmail calendar via OAuth-authenticated MCP connection

skills.name: Contacts Management
skills.description: Search and manage Fastmail contacts including create, update, and lookup operations
